narrative:
Sharon (precinct in Noble County) has 236 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.6 percentage points.
